description:
**Package Dependency on Windows 10** is a Chocolatey package for use as a dependency by package maintainers/creators. It is similar in concept to **[Chocolatey Fast Answers Extension](https://chocolatey.org/packages/chocolatey-fastanswers.extension)** to provide a (proposed) standard way for dealing with packages/programs that are OS version specific. This package will purposely fail (throw) when Windows 10 is not found or an equal to or greater than version you specify. You can use **[Test-Dependency](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/master/chocolatey-misc-helpers.extension/extensions/Test-Dependency.ps1)** from **[Chocolatey Misc Helpers Extension](https://community.chocolatey.org/packages/chocolatey-misc-helpers.extension)** to abort install of your package if the dependency is not installed.

Other OS specific dependencies can be found [here](https://chocolatey.org/packages?q=tag%3Aosdependency).

### EXAMPLE USE FOR MAINTAINERS/PACKAGERS:

![Examples](https://cdn.staticaly.com/gh/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/master/dependency-windows10/dependency-windows10/dependency-windows10_examples.png)

Look at [Version History](https://chocolatey.org/packages/dependency-windows10#versionhistory) for the builds you can specify as a minimum requirement for your package.

### NOTE TO CHOCOLATEY MODERATORS:

Seeing **dependency-windows10** listed as dependency on any package indicates the package has a requirement of Windows 10. The package will fail automated testing because of this and require an exemption.

**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/blob/master/dependency-windows10/readme.md)**

author: Bill Curran
